name: Cherries Valentine
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the cherries and peaches in a blender.
2. Add the orange juice to the blender.
3. Blend at medium speed until creamy.
4. Pour the mixture into custard glasses.
5. Top each glass with an orange wedge and a whole cherry.
6. Serve immediately or store in the fridge with each custard glass tightly covered.
7. The cherries will keep for 3 to 5 days in the fridge.
